Container.Name: terraria-connection-manager
Container.Overview: Web control panel for a Terraria server container (works great with ich777/terrariaserver). Live console, player list with IPs, kick/ban, and automatic blacklisting of IPs that hammer the server without joining. Point it at your Terraria container by name (recommended) or ID.

Config.Name: Terraria Container
Config.Description: Name (recommended) or ID of your Terraria container. The name is stable; an ID like 8ec2734d585e changes when the container is recreated.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the web control panel.

Config.Name: Web Password
Config.Description: Optional. Set a password to require login (user 'admin') before anyone can use the panel. Leave blank for no auth.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Stores the connection CSV, blacklist.json, and whitelist.json.

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Read-only Docker socket. Required so the panel can read the Terraria container's logs and send it console commands.

Config.Name: Auto-blacklist attempt threshold
Config.Description: Number of connection attempts (without ever joining) within the time window before an IP is auto-blacklisted.

Config.Name: Auto-blacklist time window (seconds)
Config.Description: Seconds over which connection attempts are counted toward the threshold.
